purpose: Activity Log entry — 2026-05-14 Abid 10am meeting: lab + Telcor pathway lock

text.content: Abid 10am meeting — Lab + Telcor pathway lock (Morshed audit gate → Fri lab visit + license payment)

Met Abid 10am. Lab + Telcor pathway locked in pending audit confirmation. Fri 5/15 12:30 Morshed touchbase reviews Abid team audit findings; if clean, Abid team visits lab same Friday afternoon to pay Telcor license, completing access to move on billing.

(1) Fri 5/15 12:30 — Morshed touchbase, audit-findings review (calendar event 29jefabuvqm8ie1l2314srmvps). (2) Fri 5/15 ~15:00 — if audit clean, Abid team @ lab pays Telcor license (calendar event r8fbldna88add3kotrgn9n9t8k, tentative). (3) Wed 5/20 14:00 — Telcor AI billing call + Gary biller proposal review (decide direction).
